entry.title: Re: SAP BW/4HANA Data Mart ADSO with multiple data loads
entry.content:
Hi Mark

Data mart DSO is comparable to Infocube of the old SAP BW Versions from 3.0 to 7.4 . All the characteristics are KEYS 

in DataMART DSO you will find your records in the INBOUND table but with identical KEYS they will not be present in the ACTIVE TABLE used for reporting. 

please check note 3430975;  from Datamart ADSO to classical ADSO 

This note explains very clearly the data modeling differences and dependencies between the different types of ADSO and the concept of inbound, active data table and change log table

hope it helps

Andrea

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for July – SAP Cloud Application Event Hub ⚽️ 🏆 🏟️
entry.content: Thanks @ajmaradiaga  for the challenge!

entry.title: Re: Multiple users for Project Controller role in S/4HANA...
entry.content:
Hello @Egorov_Evgeny 

Thank you for your question! One Project Controller can be assigned at the project master level, but this controls project responsibility, not individual timesheet posting, only in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

- Multiple users from different countries can still post timesheets to the project using their business user and role, provided they have the correct authorisations.
-Best practice is to assign those users as Project Partners or through specific timesheet authorisations, maintaining audit traceability per user.

You don’t need to assign everyone to the Project Controller project role setup; combined with role-based access ensures compliance.

Check the SAP Reference below
SAP Help – Project Roles and Timesheet Authorisations

Let me know if you need further information

Thanks and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for July – SAP Cloud Application Event Hub ⚽️ 🏆 🏟️
entry.content: Also the chalange was to find my user ID)

entry.title: Re: Alternative-Based Confirmation – An Overview
entry.content:
Thanks, for sharing this blog.

Kindly share the links to the rest of the Blogs in this series

  • How to fine control what is substituted
  • Substitution master data
  • Consumption to improve
  • Extensibility

Regards,

Neha

entry.title: Re: Reservation Document Output for S/4HANA CLOUD 2502
entry.content:
Hello @LouiseG 

Output Management for Reservation Documents requires

  •  Correct setup in Output Parameter Determination, including your form template (looks correct from your screenshot)
  • But also, the output is only triggered if the relevant output condition is met for reservations, which is often dependent on how the reservation is created and system configuration

Important to know,
For manually created reservations via apps like Create Reservation, output may not trigger automatically unless configured in the background. In many cases:

  • The output is only triggered for reservations generated by specific processes (e.g., MRP or production orders)
  • Additional output conditions may need to be maintained

Next Steps,
 Check if the output is configured for the manual reservation creation process
 Review Scope Item 1LQ closely for any process restrictions

Check below SAP Help reference below
SAP Help – Output Management S/4HANA Public Cloud

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Onboarding 2.0 - Recruit to hire data mapping validat...

entry.title: How to maintain settlement rule within Project hierarchy?
entry.content:
We would like to know if there is a way to pass settlement rules within hierarchy on WBS level.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to maintain settlement rule within Project hierar...
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


Yes, we have the possibility to pass-down Settlement Rules within the hierarchy, kindly refer to the KBAs below:

3330974 - Settlement within hierarchy for Investment Projects

3456640 - Pass-Down Settlement Rule selection in Investment Project - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Horizon Theme and Templates for Stories in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @rafael_sachs ,

thanks for reaching out.
The template is built on the Optimized Story Experience.
I contacted the development team to look into the issue.

Best regards,
Felix

entry.title: Re: Multiple users for Project Controller role in S/4HANA...
entry.content: By design, in the responsibilities section, when the project controller role is added, only the user assigned to this role, along with the project manager, has the ability to book time on behalf of the resource, as well as other activities (time validation, project invoicing). As a consequence, no other user can perform these activities apart from the project manager and the user assigned to the project controller role.

entry.title: Re: Can the LDAP system be used for user details but igno...
entry.content: Also, you can remove the action PROV to your LDAP connector which also helps avoiding provision to LDAP system

entry.title: Re: How to Restrict Access in SAP Fiori Screen Maintenanc...
entry.content: I guess, this question is not right fit for SAP GRC Access Control product

entry.title: Re: GRC BRM - Digital signature enablement Option is not...
entry.content: I don't see Digital Signature Enablement is available at present for BRM hence I would suggest you to raise an enhancement request to SAP GRC Access Control team . If you want to just authenticate the approver before approve you can utilize the relogon option from workflow stage configuration

entry.title: Standard Fiori Catalogs by Module
entry.content:
Hello,

A customer I'm working with is requesting that I give all standard Fiori authorizations for an SAP module (FI-MM-PP...) to their in-house consultant for that module. I am having difficulty finding any separation of Fiori catalogs based solely on modules. Is it possible to see them grouped that way? 

Thank you for any suggestions in advance

entry.title: The AI Adoption Journey- Detour into O*NET Codes
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I am sure I am not alone in having read the release notes about Machine Learning and FG Base AI features, coming across the “Recommend O*NET Code for Job Classification” and furrowed my brow.
Like many of you, I’m sure, you may have brushed it off as a common enough use case for some customers to need it, or maybe even accepting that it may be industry specific.
But my curiosity got the better of me- so this week I will be taking you through a little detour journey to understand what O*NET codes are, why they’re Important, and how Fieldglass uses them with our existing machine learning capabilities!


So- What are O*NET codes? A quick search tells me that they are part of something called an O*NET system, and they are used to classify and provide descriptions for various occupations.
That makes sense, but what why would that be important to me? In workforce management, a connector to this platform can play a significant part in helping a business match job titles in their company or industry with more broad occupational information.
The O*NET Resource Center is actually a database developed by the U.S Department of Labor- this means that the titles and codes that are in this database, can function as a standardized measure to help widen the range a business can cover when acquiring or cultivating a pool of talent!

Join me as we discover more about how FG can use AI to leverage this database, and how FG customers can best benefit from it!

entry.title: Re: How to assign roles to Consolidation steps ?
entry.content:
Hi Anirban,

thanks for your response. But, what I wanted to know was how to assignagent at different Consolidation steps, not when it goes into Central Governance. I mean the before the Activation step.

with more clarity, how can we assign different agents to the following different steps of Consolidation:

1) Standardization  step                  2) Matching step                     3) Calculation of Best Record  step  etc 

Hope it is clear now.

Thanks, T

entry.title: Re: OpenText VIM 7.6 SP3 for SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hello Joan,

When VIM Workplace (Vendor Invoice Management by OpenText in SAP) shows documents as "Indexed" and they appear stuck in that status (e.g., under /n/opt/vim_va2), it typically means the documents have been processed by ICC (Invoice Capture Center or OCR) and indexed, but haven't moved to the next stage of processing in VIM.

Common Reasons for "Indexed" Status:

  1. VIM Workflow not triggered properly
  2. DP document not created
  3. Error in configuration or rules (e.g., missing vendor, PO match issue)
  4. Workflows are stuck due to technical or process issues
  5. Background jobs not running or failing

Troubleshooting Steps:
1. Check Logs and Status
Go to /n/opt/vim_admin > Error Logs

Or use /n/opt/vim_analytics to analyze by status

Identify error messages for the documents stuck in "Indexed"

2. Check if DP Document was Created
Go to /n/opt/vim_va2

Select document > Check if there's a DP Number

If missing: the workflow or rule processing step might have failed

3. Check Background Jobs
Ensure these jobs are running:

/n/spro > VIM Customizing > Schedule Background Jobs

/PTGWFI/WORKFLOW_EXECUTE

/PTGWFI/FETCH_DOCS_FROM_ICC

/PTGWFI/START_WORKFLOW

You can also check via /n/smgr or /n/sm37:

Look for job failures or long delays

4. Validate Vendor/PO Mapping
If documents are not matched to vendor/PO, they may remain in "Indexed"

Check whether the vendor was correctly recognized and exists in SAP

Use VIM tables: /n/se16 > /OPT/VIM_1HEAD, Z tables, or custom ones for OCR data

5. Restart Workflow (If Safe)
If the cause is corrected, you can try re-triggering workflow manually:

In /n/opt/vim_va2: open the document

Actions > Start Workflow (or similar option)

This should resolve your issue.

If you find my response useful, I kindly request you to award kudos as a small gesture. This motivates me to serve you better.

Appreciate your feedback.

Thanks,

Divyesh

entry.title: Re: Change Package Transport layer - Public Cloud

entry.title: Re: Standard Fiori Catalogs by Module
entry.content:
Just access the Fiori Apps Library using the List view. You can customize the columns, apply the filters on the left and even export to excel.

SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library: New List View

Keep in mind that that are many apps which could be considered "Cross Module". The division by Line Of Business seems to be your best shot.

entry.content:

📍Rua Brigadeiro Franco, 3991 – Rebouças, Curitiba/PR

Consumo individual (cada um paga o seu)

entry.title: Re: Field "ZUONR" is not updating in VBRK table
entry.content: But you need to make sure that, in VTFA, the checkbox for "Assignment Number" remains empty. This way, VBAK-ZUONR will be naturally copied to VBRK-ZUONR.

entry.title: EWM Queue"Field Header: Receiving Office: Location No. is a required field for the action HDR: Save"
entry.content:
EWM Queue error: “Field Header: Receiving Office: Location No. is a required field for the action HDR: Save Node”

Field Header:

  • The Field Header typically refers to the top-level data in an SAP document that applies to the entire transaction (e.g., delivery, purchase order).
  • It includes general information such as document number, type, date, and partner details.
  • Header data is separated from item-level data to allow efficient processing and reporting.

 

Receiving Office:

  • The Receiving Office indicates the organizational unit or department responsible for receiving the goods or services.
  • It helps in identifying the internal recipient or cost center for incoming materials.
  • Often used in conjunction with purchasing documents to streamline goods receipt and accountability.

 

Location No (Location Number):

  • Location Number is a unique identifier for a physical or logical location within the warehouse or plant.
  • It is used for logistical tracking, planning, and inventory movements in modules like WM, EWM, and TM.
  • Location numbers help optimize storage, routing, and delivery processes across supply chain operations.

 

Replicating the EWM Queue Error

Step 1:
Create a purchase order using transaction code ME21N.


At the item level, maintain the inbound delivery type in the confirmation control field.


Once completed, the purchase order will be created.

 

Step 2:
Create an inbound delivery using transaction code VL31N.

Enter the supplier and purchase order details, provide the appropriate storage location, and save the document.


The inbound delivery will be created and should automatically be distributed to EWM.

 

Step 3:
The inbound delivery fails to distribute to EWM due to the following queue error:

EWM Queue Error:
Field Header: Receiving Office: Location No. is a required field for the action HDR: Save Node

This error occurs when the receiving office is not maintained in the associated Supply Chain Unit.

 

Solution Steps

Step 1:
Navigate to the configuration path to maintain the Supply Chain Unit using transaction code SPRO:
Logistics → SCWM Extended Warehouse Management → Extended Warehouse Management → Master Data → Define Supply Chain Unit.

 

Step 2:
On the “Supply Chain Unit: Initial Screen,” enter the relevant Supply Chain Unit and type, then click the “Change” button.


Go to the “Alternative” tab and create a business attribute with type RO (Goods Receipt Office). Save the changes.

Step 3:
Access transaction code SMQ2 and reprocess the failed queue.


The inbound delivery should now be distributed successfully to EWM.

 

Conclusion:

The EWM queue error related to the missing Receiving Office can be resolved by maintaining the appropriate business attribute in the Supply Chain Unit.
Once corrected, reprocessing the queue allows successful distribution of the inbound delivery to EWM.

entry.title: Re: Analytical Insights in Joule (powered by SAP Analytics Cloud), Controlled release in Q1 2025
entry.content: Does JOULE only work with data acquisition models?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Services - IPS assigning group with validity date
entry.content: No solution - SAP have advised that IPS does not provision date for groups / roles

entry.title: Beyond SAP Cloud - Episode 29: Cloud Identity Services Introduction
entry.content:
In this episode, we explore Cloud Identity Service, a crucial tool for securing BTP environments. It includes three key services: Identity Authentication, Identity Directory, and Identity Provisioning. These services enable single sign-on, manage user authorization, and streamline user provisioning from various systems. The authentication service connects your corporate identity provider to ensure seamless access across cloud solutions, while the directory manages user groups and roles. Provisioning automates user creation and synchronization. By using Cloud Identity Services, organizations can enhance security, improve user management, and simplify integration across multiple platforms.

Takeaways

  • Identity Cloud Service is made up of three key services: Identity Authentication, Identity Provisioning, and Identity Directory.
  • Identity Authentication service helps secure the environment by integrating with your corporate identity provider for single sign-on (SSO) capabilities.
  • Cloud Identity service acts as a proxy between BTP (Business Technology Platform) and the corporate identity provider, enabling seamless authentication.
  • Without a corporate identity provider, you won't be able to set up SSO, but it is possible to authenticate without it.
  • The goal of Cloud Identity services is to allow integration across all SAP cloud solutions, ensuring consistent authentication through a single token.
  • Cloud Identity service offers additional security features such as two-factor authentication, risk-based authentication, and conditional authentication.
  • Conditional authentication can support different authentication strategies for internal vs external users, such as routing internal users to a corporate identity provider and external users to Cloud Identity.
  • The Identity Directory service stores user information within Cloud Identity Services, but this is not mandatory for all use cases. It can be enabled if needed.
  • Newer services like Built Apps and SuccessFactors require user data to be available in Cloud Identity, making it important to enable the user store when using those services.
  • Identity Provisioning allows users to be provisioned from external systems (e.g., S/4 HANA) into Cloud Identity's identity directory using the SCIM protocol.
  • Even though single sign-on can be set up without Cloud Identity services by directly integrating with a corporate identity provider, using Cloud Identity services is recommended for better efficiency and support for new services in BTP.

entry.title: Re: no reference documents appear when create return order in app "Manage Customer Returns &quo

entry.title: Re: WBMR not created in EWM warehouse billing for TM agre...

entry.title: Re: SAP public cloud edition. CO assigment is not availab...
entry.content:
Hello @Ester2 

Posting Area 2610 for Convergent Invoicing has limited flexibility in the S4 Public cloud. The COKEY (CO Assignment) field is not available for mass updates through SSCUI or standard apps.

You can try below

  • Maintain the field manually per entry
  • Check configuration in CBC > Convergent Invoicing > Posting Area 2610
  • Raise an SAP Incident if mass maintenance is critical for your process

SAP Help Portal – Convergent Invoicing in S/4HANA Cloud: (choose the country)

Unfortunately, mass updates for CO assignments in this posting area are limited in the Public Cloud.

Hope it helps

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Invoice Date Control While Creating Customer Invoice
entry.content:
Hello @serap_acar 

SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER doesn’t provide the invoice date (FKDAT) at the time of creation, and direct ABAP program calls aren’t allowed in the S4Public Cloud. Check this SAP API Business Hub – Released APIs for S/4HANA Cloud

What to do!
Use Custom Logic (In-App Extensibility) and check BADIs like SD_BILLING_DOCUMENT_CREATE. If FKDAT is available, compare it to existing invoices using released CDS Views, and trigger an error if needed.

Thank you and kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Follow-Up Material Not Considered In MRP Run
entry.content: Hello @Caetano, Thanks for your reply. I have gone through the note and still I don't find the root cause of this issue. I have attached the snaps here, snap 'After MRP for All Pack Material' is the MRP results when we ran the MRP for all packaging material and 'Individual MRP' is the snap when we run individual MRP for this material. We can clearly see that when we run the MRP for all packaging material that time system has not generated any PR for the dependent requirements whereas when we ran MRP individually it has created the PR. Interestingly we have maintained this same material as follow up material for two plants. Issue is occurring only in one plant, another plant with similar setup creating PR when we ran MRP for all packaging material. I have mistakenly mentioned the requirements in my question but it's passing the requirements on follow-up material. only the issue is it's not creating the PR for that material when we ran the MRP for all packaging materials. Let me know if you required any further details.

entry.title: Re: Loading Master and Transactional Data from Datasphere...

entry.title: Changing of Email Adress for my S-User / Universal ID does not work
entry.content:
Hello together,

I can't change the mail address for my S-User - and my system administrator can't do so either. In the Universal ID it shows me the wrong mail address as well, but when I try to change it the system shows the new email Address. 

How to change my S-user email address here?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Changing of Email Adress for my S-User / Universal ID...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

To change S-user email address, kindly refer to KBA 3108466 - How to update the email address for S-user IDs - SAP for Me.

  • For S-users linked to SAP Universal ID, the following steps need to be performed:
  1. Add the new e-mail address to the UID in the SAP Account Manager by following the steps in KBA 2882908.
  2. Contact the company's Super Administrators, User Administrators, or Cloud Administrators (listed here) to change their S-user ID email address for them in the User Management application (guide in KBA 1271545).
  • For S-users not linked to Universal IDs, contact the company's Super Administrators, User Administrators, or Cloud Administrators (listed here) to change their S-user ID email address for them in the User Management application.

Hope the above information helps.

Thanks and regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: outbound delivery batch determine VCH1 exclusion and user exit
entry.content:
Dear Export,

We have a scenario during sales outbound delivery batch determination: for some customer material combination, some batch needs to be excluded or can only be specify , the reason for the exclusion or specify various, batch characteristic don't include all the reasons, so in a way, we need to directly exclude or specify some batch. So we are wondering if 1. Can we setup exclusion such as batch in VCH1, how should we maintain, such as what symbol? 2. Is there an user exit to modify the batch determine selection results? such as for the VCH1 setup, system pick up 8 avaliable batch, we can use the user exit to exclude 2 batches, only remining 6 batch parcitipate the batch assignment, or directly pick the specify batch?

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Client copy how to for beginners
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"

  • The ABAP Dictionary is a data dictionary that is part of the ABAP Repository:
    • Each piece of ABAP Dictionary information is entered only once and is then available anywhere in the system at any time. The ABAP Dictionary automatically supplies all new or changed information, thus providing current runtime objects and ensuring data consistency and security.
    • The SAP runtime environment consists of all ABAP programs required during execution. The ABAP interpreters in the runtime environment do not use the original of an ABAP program. Rather, they use a copy generated once only during runtime (early binding). Runtime objects, such as programs and screens, are automatically regenerated (late binding) when a time stamp comparison between the object and the ABAP Dictionary detects a difference.
    • This combination of early binding and late binding ensures that the active integration of ABAP"

Thanks for your sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

🙂

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Can not find app - Edit Actual Costing Runs (CKMLCP)

entry.title: Compatibility Packの結果について/ Regarding the result of Compatibility Pack
entry.content:
SAP for MEー「Services & Support」ー「Diagnostics, Reporting & Analytics」ー「SAP EarlyWatch Alert Solution Finder」でCompatibilityPackを検索したところ、添付ファイルの結果でした。

ステータス「OK」となっているため、影響なしという判断で問題ないでしょか？
ご教示ください。

よろしくお願いいたします。

===============

Green status assigned for the EWA chapter "Compatibility Package usage", Am I right that this means no further action is required from our side?

Chapter can be found via: SAP for MEー「Services & Support」ー「Diagnostics, Reporting & Analytics」ー「SAP EarlyWatch Alert Solution Finder」->Compatibility Pack


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Compatibility Packの結果について/ Regarding the result of Co...
entry.content:
ご担当者様

いつもお世話になっております。

お問い合わせにつき、回答させていただきます。
＞ステータス「OK」となっているため、影響なしという判断で問題ないでしょか？
＝＞はい、ご認識の通りです。この「Compatibility Package usage」部分は問題ないです。必要となる対応もございません。

以上、宜しくお願い致します。
SAP サポート

=========================

Hi customer,

Yes, as the EWA suggested, no further action is required.

Sincerely,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Business transaction can not be processed by consolidation message no f5583
entry.content: This error is due to different company code in one entry.For example,IDoc has this error because T076I has been maintain different company.

entry.title: Re: Before deactivating a material is there a report I ca...
entry.content: You can check in mb51 report

entry.title: SAPBusinessOne-How to use Formatted Search to Copy the value from header to row for Whse in SO?
entry.content:
SAP Business One - How to use Formatted Search to Copy the value of Customer Code (CardCode) from header to row value for Warehouse in Sales Order?

Note: The Business Partner Code (CardCode) and Warehouse Code are manually inputted with the same value. e.g. Business Partner Code = BP1001 and Warehouse code = BP1001. This setup meant that each Customer has an assigned Warehouse with the same value.

entry.title: 세금계산서 발행 및 계산서일자 조정 요청
entry.content:
안녕하세요.

6월 10 ~ 12일에 진행 된  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Go-live Experience Workshop 관련 Invoice를 받았는데요.

관련하여 3명이 참석했었고 3개의 Invoice를 각각 수신하였습니다.

하지만 회사에서 처리 하려면 Invoice가 아닌 세금계산서가 필요합니다.

대상 Invoice No. :  9039006980, 9039006981,  9039006982

Invoice 일자  : 7월 1일

감사합니다.

entry.title: Discount % in Goods Issue
entry.content:
Hi community,

There is a confusing for which I am writing this , In goods issue screen the total was not matching with the calculation, info price * qty but when enabled the Discount % column from form settings, here we can see the discount percentage has been calculated without manual intervention for which the total are not matching as per formula.

Could anyone let me know how this discount % is calculated automatically during goods issue , in this case the inventory valuation method is FIFO.

entry.title: Re: SAP Walkme and SAP Enable Now
entry.content: Shane my client (J&J MedTech) has had me and others put a LOT of time and effort into SAP Companion: links from all apps to simulations, 100+ Guided Tours, even more help tiles. When I used WalkMe a few years ago it was dramatically inferior. Certainly hoping there will be a way to keep the extensive content we have?

entry.title: Re: SAP Walkme and SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi Will,

The current feedback that I have is that SAP Enable Now content, such as Simulations and Book Pages, will be able to be loaded onto the WalkMe platform and continue to be updated and distributed to end users. This is not the case with SAP Companion content; please refer to this Community post by Kristina Kunad for more detail.   Please have your customer discuss their concerns with their SAP representative and they can provide feedback to the team managing this transition.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP Walkme and SAP Enable Now
entry.content: Provided more complete information in a separate response

entry.title: Re: 有没有一个报表或者CDS，可以查看所有物料的标注价格、实际价格、库存数量、收发货数量
entry.content: 您好，这些CDS视图，也只能给我提供一个CDS基础数据。是否是需要我依据这些CDS视图，做自定义的报表？

entry.title: Re: Sudden wrong results in app behaviour for previous well working formulas in settings and compone
entry.content:
@timokapanen 

Dear Timo,

I put a timer after app launch (5 seconds) for the creation of the audio files from base64 and stored locally (about 50 in a row) and now the app is working well.

Best regards,

Chantal

entry.title: Re: Sales order stock determination on the delivery
entry.content: Not sure on your statement that system searches only for normal stock in delivery.  In general, if there is sale order stock made available with batch assigned, system will give allocate that stock during delivery creation.  If there is no special stock available during delivery creation, then, system will look for unrestricted batch stock.

entry.title: Re: When entering stock and non stock item in order cost is getting updated in one category YB2
entry.content: Have you checked your mappings across the "costing" SSCUI's in public cloud? 1. Maintain Value Categories 2. Assign Cost Elements to Value Categories? If you have configured that, have you also had a look at SSCUI 100297 - Automatic Account Determination?, that is functionally similar to OBYC in Private Cloud and helps with integrating Inventory Management movements. Tim

entry.title: Re: outbound delivery batch determine VCH1 exclusion and user exit
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: Assign account assignment object to a profit center
entry.content: I also receive message 'Please assign account assignment object PSG .../... to a profit center' when I upload ACACTREE01 without Profit center (Business area) and I just fill PSG. After I fill Profit center and Business Area, it will be fine

entry.title: Having Trouble Uploading XSD File to "Define Statutory Report" Fiori App?
entry.content:
I'm encountering an issue when trying to upload an XSD file into the "Define Statutory Report" Fiori app. I'm using an XSD file generated from the "Maintain Form Template" app, but I receive the following error message:

"File YY1_XXX.xsd does not have any entry points. Upload a valid file."

Could anyone help me understand why this error is occurring and how to resolve it?

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Integration with BigQuery
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking for guidance on how to connect SAP SuccessFactors with Google BigQuery.

The objective is to extract data from SAP SF and push it into BigQuery, and then load the new data back to SAP SF. I’m exploring different integration methods and would appreciate any advice on:

  • The best way to establish the connection
  • Whether to use Integration Center, SAP CPI, or any other method
  • Any documentation, experiences, or lessons learned from those who have done something similar

Would appreciate any help or pointers you can share. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: outbound delivery batch determine VCH1 exclusion and...
entry.content:
Hi,

We can not do the exclusion in the batch determination, instead if we have criteria on what basis these batch allotted to the customer based on date or characteristics ?
If we can maintain that particular characteristics in every batch and also in the VCH1, the batch determination will occur as required like only the batches which satisfy the new condition will be considered.
let us know more on based on which characteristics the exclusion needs to be maintained.

If the characteristics can not be maintained in the batch master, then try using "VB_BD_SELECTION" as referred in the below link.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ERP/47df9b925c0142bf9060d3176e924f82/8ffdb753128eb44ce10000000a174cb4.html?version=6.05.latest

Hope this helps!!!

Best Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: Re: Premium Hub CoE – DSC Knowledge Bits Series – Field Catalogs for Transportation Cockpit in SAP T
entry.content:
Hello @Aleksey_Belskii,

Could you tell if it's possible to make custom TM cockpit field contain link to action?

I was trying to set up corresponding display type via /SCMTMS/CL_UI_PLN_UIBB_BASE->GET_ENHANCEMENT_FIELD_DESCR and via view exit class, but it doesn't work.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Time type group container/collector - Cross year cumulating counting overtime hours
entry.content:
Hi @marianaBrownR,

I think, I have a very similar requirement. I think, for the Working Time Account it is totally correct to configure it as Permanent. Quite often the balance is capped and paid out on the 31st Dec., e.g. with a Periodic Update. Anyway, like in your example with the 20 hours (it's funny, I exactly need 20 hours in one of my current cases), it is not capped to Zero. Therefore, in the Working Time Account are still 20 hours (that is correct), but the Time Container is reset. The Maximum length of Time Container, as of now, is 12 month from a specified Reference Date. This is my current config:

I would need a Permanent Time Container, so the warning message "You exceeded the threshold for the WTA" is still correct. Almost every customer (at least in Germany) has such rules.

I thank you for your post and wonder if there is any solution, that I maybe oversee.

I would create an Improvement Request for Permanent Time Containers but first I wanted to see, if someone here has a solution.

Best Regards, Dirk

entry.title: Re: assign account assignment object PSG A000/29468 to a profit center
entry.content: I also receive message 'Please assign account assignment object PSG .../... to a profit center' when I upload ACACTREE01 without Profit center (Business area) and I just fill PSG. After I fill Profit center and Business Area, it will be fine

entry.title: Re: Setting of different Credit Limit Days as per differe...
entry.content: Sir, Its S4 HANA 2020

entry.title: Re: 🇸🇬 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core ( Singapore )
entry.content: hello @MichelleJoseph the session will be at Level 3, Room 309 C1-C5.

entry.title: Your request is under clarification by Export Control
entry.content:
How to resolve this problem?

I want to use CAL to create SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS03, Fully-Activated Appliance.
However, I got this error message " Your request is under clarification by Export Control. We will send you an email as soon as the clarification has been provided."

I am waiting over a week, but not received any email yet

entry.title: Re: SAPBusinessOne-How to use Formatted Search to Copy th...
entry.content:
Hi

save this query

SELECT $[$4.0.0]

Go into Warehouse-Field. Open FMS use the saved query. Trigger it when ItemCode changes.

regeards Lothar

entry.title: Re: how to throw message in webdynpro
entry.content:
Hello,

this is just two lines, for instance

 data(lo_msg_manager) = view->if_wd_controller~get_message_manager( ).
 lo_msg_manager->report_error_message( exporting message_text = 'This is an error message' ).

You can access many samples also in one of the test applications, e.g.: WDR_TEST_MESSAGE*, WDR_TEST_MSG*

Regards,

Simon

entry.title: Extend my learning hub internal edition before expiry
entry.content:
Hi,

I exhausted my free 4 attempts this year for certification. SAP learning Hub Internal Edition validity was till Dec 2025. Is there a way or possible to renew it before expiry instead of waiting till Dec 2025?

entry.content: How to activate the field 'calculate tax automatically' (XMWST) field for AP Open Items while loading with LTMC technique during the creation of an invoice to get the tax lines.

entry.content:
Hi @Kushagra, 

the problem was solved by creating a case.
The Dev Support fixed it via admin work.

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting Public Cloud Edition Consolidation Mo...
entry.content: The deprecation of the old Consolidation Monitor was not started yet. Both apps are available and are distinguished with the subtitle New Version/Old Version.

entry.title: Re: Scope of Java Developer??
entry.content: 1. Strong Demand & Stability Java remains one of the top languages used by 90% of Fortune 500 companies for enterprise-grade systems reddit.com It's vital in industries like finance, healthcare, e‑commerce, government, and telecom . According to market reports, Java roles are projected to grow (~13% in the U.S. alone by 2028) and maintain high demand 2. Modern and Evolving Ecosystem With Java 21 LTS and lighter virtual threads, Java is more performant and developer-friendly, especially for high‑concurrency apps Frameworks like Spring Boot, Quarkus, Jakarta EE, and cloud integrations make Java central to microservices and cloud-native development . 3. Expansion Into Emerging Technologies Java is actively used in AI/ML (Deeplearning4j, Weka, TensorFlow Java), Big Data (Hadoop, Spark), IoT, blockchain, and MLOps 4. Growing Roles & Skill Sets Java developers are increasingly involved in DevOps, CI/CD, Docker/Kubernetes, and cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP) The full-stack developer role—with Java back-end and modern front-end (React, Angular)—is also on the rise 5. Salary & Outsourcing Trends U.S. Java developer salaries range from $88K (mid-level) to over $160K (senior) In India, salaries typically span ₹5 L–9 L for entry-level, ₹10 L–18 L mid-level, and ₹18 L–30 L+ for senior roles Although global outsourcing rates have softened due to AI and cost pressures, Java specialists remain in demand . 6. Java: Future-Proofed & Versatile Reddit users confirm: “Java is one of the core languages used for the backend infrastructure of the biggest companies ... Lots of multinational companies currently develop their cloud native solution with the use of Java.” reddit.com “Java is here to stay for a long long time. Millions of lines of code in many major companies.” Java’s stability, massive codebase, and continuous evolution ensure it’s not going away. 7. How to Maximize Scope as a Java Developer To remain competitive, modern Java developers should also: Master modern Java: Learn Java 21+ features like virtual threads and pattern matching Embrace frameworks: Gain expertise in Spring Boot, Quarkus, Jakarta EE, and Spring AI Adopt cloud-native & DevOps tools: Learn Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and cloud platforms Explore AI/ML and data processing: Familiarize with Java-based libraries for machine learning and big data . Build full-stack & soft skills: Add front-end skills (JS frameworks), architecture best practices, and strong system-design knowledge .

entry.title: Explore SAPUI5/OpenUI5 1.136.x-legacy-free
entry.content:
Executive summary

SAPUI5 1.136.x-legacy-free is available to test your code for future-proof best practices and to provide early feedback to the UI5 team.

Why?

The UI5 team introduces the SAPUI5 / OpenUI5 1.136.x-legacy-free version to mark a significant milestone in our journey towards modernizing UI5 applications. It introduces a legacy-free UI5 framework with deprecated code removed, resulting in a leaner and more efficient codebase. Going forward, this step is crucial for improving performance, reducing maintenance efforts, and enabling faster innovation for both, the UI5 framework itself as well as applications built with SAPUI5 / OpenUI5.

The new SAPUI5 / OpenUI5 1.136.x-legacy-free version allows to evolve in these areas:

  • Best practices for app development: A legacy-free UI5 framework paves the way for application developers to follow UI5 best practices. With streamlined, clear APIs, application developers learn and develop with SAPUI5 / OpenUI5 more easily. (Note that applying the UI5 best practices is not a new recommendation or a one-time effort for a specific version. SAP recommends following these best practices continuously to leverage innovations more easily.)
  • Startup performance: With the modular core, new bootstrap and additional opportunities to improve performance we expect to see a better experience when launching and using apps.
  • Smooth UI performance: The legacy-free UI5 framework mandates efficient code to achieve an improved UI performance more easily. This happens e.g. by using fine granular tasks and asynchronous JavaScript only.
  • Browser / Web standards: A legacy-free UI5 framework makes it easier to stay up to date with the browser evolution and to follow latest Web standards. Content Security Policy (CSP) compliance ensures improved application security.
  • Micro frontends: The removal of global variables simplifies the orchestration of micro frontends.
  • Speed of innovation: It becomes easier for application developers to make progress and innovate with new features. Also, the UI5 framework itself can deliver requested capabilities more rapidly. At the same time, less resources are needed for maintenance, shifting the focus towards innovative, yet stable capabilities and a future-proof applications with upcoming SAPUI5 / OpenUI5 versions.

In this context we conducted a Customer Engagement Initiative project in 2024 and received very positive feedback from a small group of customers/partners. We now want to give anyone the opportunity to

  • test how compliant your existing code is to UI5 best practices,
  • ensure that your new code is state-of-the-art and future-proof,
  • provide your concrete, technical feedback directly to the UI5 team.

What?

The UI5 team provides cloud access to the SAPUI5 / OpenUI5 1.136 legacy-free version with deprecated code removed. This version is generally available under the terms of the SAP Developer License Agreement, not to be used in productive scenarios. Also see SAP Note 3621332.

  1. Explore SAPUI5 / OpenUI5 1.136 legacy-free: We encourage you to validate your app developments against this new version, while you continue using a usual standard 1.x version for your productive environments.
  2. Make an impact: Test your app and report issues with the 1.136 legacy-free version to the UI5 team.

The UI5 team strongly recommends developing apps without using legacy code
to ensure your app is modern and future-proof.

 

UI5 Demo Kit with UI5 Best Practices

How?

Follow the steps detailed out in Using the 1.x-legacy-free Versions:

  1. Check your code against the UI5 Best Practices, specifically the Best Practices for SAPUI5 1.136-legacy-free. The UI5 linter helps analyzing & autofixing your code.
  2. Bootstrap your app with SAPUI5 1.136.x-legacy-free from the UI5 cloud CDN (OpenUI5 to follow):
      • SAPUI5 1.136.3-legacy-free
      • SAPUI5 1.136-legacy-free      (evergreen version)
      • SAPUI5 legacy-free                  (default version)
  3. Test run your app in the Preview (sandbox) of SAP Build Code / SAP Business Application Studio.
  4. Report issues to the UI5 team: Create an incident on the respective component within CA-UI5*, using “[LF]” as prefix of the subject. (Formally, this delivery has no SAP standard support / service level agreement, and your incidents might be set to priority Low. Still, the UI5 team will learn from your feedback and plan/implement required features.)

Going forward

The planned* release strategy follows quarterly new versions of legacy-free SAPUI5 / OpenUI5:

  • 1.136.x-legacy-free
  • 1.139.x-legacy-free
  • …

We plan to delete SAPUI5 / OpenUI5 legacy-free versions 4 weeks after a newer version (release or patch) is available or when SAP stops the option to explore SAPUI5/OpenUI5 1.136.x-legacy-free altogether.

Note: This initiative is part of SAPUI5's ongoing effort to innovate the SAPUI5 / OpenUI5 framework towards a modern and future-proof code base. At the current point in time, we do not have a timeline for next steps in this context. As soon as available, we'll publish in official UI5 channels such as the SAPUI5 Road Map, UI5 mailing list and UI5 announcements, LinkedIn, and Bluesky. The SAPUI5 team appreciates your patience and looks forward to your feedback as we continue to evolve and improve SAPUI5 / OpenUI5 and applications built with it.

* Legal Disclaimer: This information, or any related document and SAP's strategy and possible future developments, products and or platforms directions and functionality are all subject to change and may be changed by SAP at any time for any reason without notice.

entry.title: Re: Reservation Document Output for S/4HANA CLOUD 2502
entry.content:
Hello @LouiseG 

Thank you for your remark, Please know that reservations are often not listed explicitly in the general Output Management article, which focuses more on sales, purchasing, etc. For Reservations, the logic is embedded under Inventory Management (Scope Item 1LQ), and the output is process-dependent.

  • Check if your system uses the standard Output Type RESB, if available
  • Some setups only allow output for reservations generated via MRP or production processes
  • For manual reservations, custom logic or additional configuration may be needed
  • Open the Output Parameter Determination app in your 2502 (or later) S/4HC tenant.
  • Look for a ‘Reservation Document’ option in the "Show Rules for" dropdown.
  • If it appears, configure it similar to other objects (assign form templates, output types).
  • Test both manual and automatic reservation scenarios.

Also Check  Output Parameter Determination -SAP Help 

Hope it helps

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Clarification on Social Security Contributions for Enhanced Maternity/Paternity Benefits in Spain
entry.content:
A recent clarification from Spanish Social Security (TGSS) has helped resolve a common question raised by SAP customers: How should enhanced maternity and paternity benefits provided by companies be treated in terms of social security contributions?

This blog post summarizes the official guidance and outlines key compliance steps for SAP users to ensure accurate payroll processing.

The Question:

Some customers reported receiving conflicting instructions from different provincial offices of TGSS. Specifically, they were told that company-paid top-ups to maternity/paternity benefits should not be included in the contribution base and should only be used to calculate the solidarity contribution (cuota de solidaridad).

The Official Clarification

TGSS has confirmed that, under Article 147.2.d) of the General Social Security Law (LGSS):

  • Inclusion in Contribution Base: Company-paid enhancements to maternity/paternity benefits must be included in the worker’s contribution base. These are not excluded like Social Security benefits or temporary incapacity improvements.
  • Solidarity Contribution: If the total base exceeds the maximum contribution cap, the excess amount is subject to a solidarity contribution.
  • Special Cases: For maternity/paternity leaves starting in January or February—or when the maximum base increases due to a new calendar year—contributions must cover:
    • Common contingencies (CC) and occupational contingencies (AT/EP) for the difference between the regular base and the new maximum.
    • Solidarity contributions for any amount exceeding the maximum base.

This clarification confirms that there has been no legal change—these top-ups have always been considered part of the contribution base when applicable.

Implications for SAP Users

SAP users should ensure their payroll systems are aligned with this guidance. Key areas to review include:

  • Base Contribution: Enhanced maternity/paternity benefits must be included in the regular contribution base.
  • Solidarity Contributions: Systems must be able to identify when the base exceeds the maximum and apply the solidarity contribution accordingly.
  • Year-End Adjustments: Pay special attention to transitions between years, when maximum bases may change.

Steps for compliance SAP

To ensure your SAP system is compliant:

  1. Review Payroll Configuration
    Confirm that wage types used for maternity/paternity top-ups are marked as subject to contribution and correctly mapped in the contribution base.
  2. Check Contribution Base Logic
    Validate that the system calculates the base using the correct reference period (e.g., the month prior to the month before the leave starts) and adjusts for maximum base thresholds.
  3. Test Solidarity Contribution Scenarios
    Simulate cases where the employee is at or near the maximum base to ensure the system correctly applies solidarity contributions.
  4. Educate HR and Payroll Teams
    Share this clarification with relevant teams to avoid misinterpretation and ensure consistent handling across the organization.
  5. Consult SAP Experts if Needed. 
    If your system behavior differs from this guidance, consider reaching out to SAP consultants or support for assistance.

Final Note

This clarification from TGSS helps eliminate ambiguity and ensures consistent, compliant payroll processing for enhanced maternity/paternity benefits. By aligning your SAP system with these rules, you can avoid errors and ensure legal compliance.

If you have questions or would like to share how your organization is handling this, feel free to join the discussion in the comments below.

entry.title: Re: Correlation ID: 19715662052349928425023642598751 (SAC...
entry.content:
Dear @md_fasi,

I'm not an expert regarding BW and Bex queries, but I also did some experiments with setting data action parameter values via script.
Even if the data action ran successful, I sometimes could see errors related to the parameters in the Data Action Job Monitor. 
Most errors occured when I didn't handover the parameter correctly, normally you add parameter values using the pattern [DimensionID].[HierarchyID].[MemberID].

Hopefully this helps you to solve your issue.
Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: Re: How to achieve the data refresh in canvas page from l...
entry.content:
For Refreshing the canvas page with the selected rows as data from the List report table.

Add the Event Bus code before the navigation code to canvas page.

 var oEventBus = sap.ui.getCore().getEventBus();
                        oEventBus.publish("RefreshChannel", "DataUpdated", {
                            data: aSelectedItems
                        });
Then, in canvas page add the below code in onInit function of the controller file:
            this._oEventBus = sap.ui.getCore().getEventBus();
            this._oEventBus.subscribe("RefreshChannel", "DataUpdated", this._handleDataUpdate, this);
Now, add the _handleDataUpdate function in the same controller:
_handleDataUpdate: function (sChannelId, sEventId, oData) {
            var oModel = new sap.ui.model.json.JSONModel({
                selectedItems: oData.data
            });
            this.getView().setModel(oModel, "selectedItems");
            oModel.refresh(true);
           // Rest of the refresh code if required any, on loading
}

entry.title: What is the difference between Replicate Runtime Hierarchy and global hierarchies？
entry.content:
Dear all:

When I follow Public cloud scope item J55 2.5.3 Replicate Runtime Hierarchy for Hierarchy ID YPS2 （Financial Statement Version SAP Best Practices Contribution Margin Report Merg）. There is the error：“ Cannot execute. Hierarchy YPS2 has been migrated to global hierarchies”. Even though I am inactive YPS2 in global hierarchies, the same error still occurs.

I am confused whether to import the Hierarchy ID used for profit analysis into global hierarchies or only replicate the Runtime Hierarchy. What is the difference between these two functions?
Thank you &Best regards!
Wang

entry.title: Re: Internal Reconciliation for BP with Both Customer and...
entry.content: thanks Divyesh

entry.title: Re: How to activate the field 'calculate tax automaticall...
entry.content: Try running the program RFBIBL00 in batch in B or C mode

entry.title: Re: Associated GL Company - FI Company

entry.title: Re: How to restrict authorization for contract activation...
entry.content: May i know if this is resolved? Can i know what is the solution?

entry.title: Issue Importing API Proxy After Adding Fault Rule in ProxyEndpoint
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I attempted to add a fault rule in the ProxyEndpoint of an API Proxy to handle error exceptions within the API. However, after downloading the API proxy, modifying it locally to include the fault rule, and re-importing it into SAP API Management, I encountered the following error:

The fault rule we have added is :

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ProxyEndPoint default="true" xmlns="http://www.sap.com/apimgmt">
    <name>default</name>
    <base_path>/v1/erp/pricingsimulator/poc</base_path>
    <properties/>
    <routeRules>
        <routeRule>
            <name>default</name>
            <targetEndPointName>default</targetEndPointName>
            <sequence>1</sequence>
            <faultRules/>
        </routeRule>
    </routeRules>
    <faultRules>
        <faultRule>
            <name>NoAPIKeyError</name>
            <condition>(fault.name = "FailedToResolveAPIKey")</condition>
            <steps>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>NoAPIKeyError</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>1</sequence>
                </step>
            </steps>
        </faultRule>
        <faultRule>
            <name>InvalidAPIKeyError</name>
            <condition>(fault.name = "InvalidApiKey")</condition>
            <steps>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>InvalidAPIKeyError</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>1</sequence>
                </step>
            </steps>
        </faultRule>
        <faultRule>
            <name>BasicAuthMissing</name>
            <condition>(BasicAuthentication.decodeBasicCreds.failed = true)</condition>
            <steps>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>BasicAuthMissing</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>1</sequence>
                </step>
            </steps>
        </faultRule>
    </faultRules>
    <preFlow>
        <name>PreFlow</name>
        <request>
            <isRequest>true</isRequest>
            <steps>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>OAuth</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>1</sequence>
                </step>
            </steps>
        </request>
        <response>
            <isRequest>true</isRequest>
            <steps/>
        </response>
    </preFlow>
    <postFlow>
        <name>PostFlow</name>
        <request>
            <isRequest>true</isRequest>
            <steps/>
        </request>
        <response>
            <isRequest>true</isRequest>
            <steps>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>KVMO_GetCPIUrl</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>2</sequence>
                </step>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>logToElasticSearch</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>5</sequence>
                </step>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>generateLogMessage</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>3</sequence>
                </step>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>LoggingBasicAuth</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>4</sequence>
                </step>
                <step>
                    <policy_name>KVMO_CPICredentials</policy_name>
                    <condition> </condition>
                    <sequence>1</sequence>
                </step>
            </steps>
        </response>
    </postFlow>
    <conditionalFlows>
        <conditionalFlow>
            <name>DefaultFaultFlow</name>
            <request>
                <isRequest>true</isRequest>
                <steps>
                    <step>
                        <policy_name>defaultRaiseFaultPolicy</policy_name>
                        <condition> </condition>
                        <sequence>1</sequence>
                    </step>
                </steps>
            </request>
            <conditions>proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/getsimulation" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/getsimulation/**" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/getsimulation(**"</conditions>
            <readOnly>false</readOnly>
            <sequence>1</sequence>
        </conditionalFlow>
        <conditionalFlow>
            <name>getsimulation</name>
            <conditions>(proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/getsimulation" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/getsimulation/**" OR proxy.pathsuffix MatchesPath "/getsimulation(**")AND(request.verb = "POST")</conditions>
            <readOnly>false</readOnly>
            <sequence>0</sequence>
        </conditionalFlow>
    </conditionalFlows>
</ProxyEndPoint>

 

Queries : 

  1. What is the issue causing here ?
  2. File format we are using : Zip (Do we need to use 7-zip for this , we have compressed the file to zip file?)
  3. Does the folder name within the APIProxy during import should be in the same order as the download folder,  This is the order of the file we are importing in API.  

Could you please help me understand what might be causing this issue?

Thanks

 

Vaisu Raj

entry.title: Aclaración sobre la cotización de mejoras de prestaciones por nacimiento y cuidado de menor - España
entry.content:
Tenemos una aclaración reciente por parte de la Tesorería General de la Seguridad Social (TGSS) que ha resuelto una duda frecuente planteada por varios clientes de SAP: ¿Cómo deben tratarse las mejoras empresariales a las prestaciones por nacimiento y cuidado de menor(maternidad y paternidad) en términos de cotización?

En este artículo detallamos la respuesta oficial e indicamos los pasos clave para garantizar el cumplimiento normativo y una correcta configuración del sistema SAP.

La Consulta

Algunos clientes informaron haber recibido instrucciones contradictorias desde distintas delegaciones provinciales de la TGSS. En concreto, se indicaba que los complementos empresariales a las prestaciones por nacimiento y cuidado de menor no debían incluirse en la base de cotización, y que solo debían tenerse en cuenta para calcular la cuota de solidaridad.

Aclaración Oficial

La TGSS ha confirmado que, según el artículo 147.2.d) de la Ley General de la Seguridad Social (LGSS):

  • Inclusión en la Base de Cotización: Las mejoras empresariales a las prestaciones por maternidad/paternidad deben incluirse en la base de cotización del trabajador. No están excluidas como las prestaciones de la Seguridad Social o las mejoras por incapacidad temporal.
  • Cotización por Solidaridad: Si la base total supera el tope máximo de cotización, el exceso debe cotizarse mediante la cuota de solidaridad.
  • Casos Especiales: En situaciones donde la baja por maternidad/paternidad comienza en enero o febrero —o cuando se produce un incremento del tope máximo por cambio de año— se debe cotizar:
    • Por contingencias comunes (CC) y contingencias profesionales (AT/EP) por la diferencia entre la base reguladora y la base máxima.
    • Por solidaridad por cualquier importe que exceda la base máxima.

Esta aclaración confirma que no ha habido ningún cambio legal: estas mejoras siempre han debido formar parte de la base de cotización cuando corresponde.

Implicaciones para Usuarios de SAP

Los usuarios de SAP deben asegurarse de que sus sistemas de nómina estén alineados con la lnormativa. A revisar:

  • Base de Cotización: Las mejoras por maternidad/paternidad deben incluirse en la base de cotización habitual.
  • Cuota de Solidaridad: El sistema debe identificar cuándo se supera la base máxima y aplicar la cotización por solidaridad.
  • Ajustes de Año Nuevo: Prestar especial atención a los cambios de año, cuando se actualizan los topes máximos.

Pasos para el Cumplimiento en SAP

Para garantizar que tu sistema SAP esté alineado con esta normativa:

  1. Revise la Configuración de Nómina
    Verifica que los conceptos de nómina utilizados para las mejoras estén marcados como cotizables y correctamente asignados a la base de cotización.
  2. Valide la Lógica de Cálculo de la Base
    Asegúrate de que el sistema utilice el periodo de referencia correcto (por ejemplo, el mes anterior al mes previo al inicio de la baja) y que ajuste correctamente los topes máximos.
  3. Pruebe Escenarios de Solidaridad
    Simula casos en los que el empleado esté cerca o en el tope máximo para comprobar que el sistema aplica correctamente la cotización por solidaridad.
  4. Forme a los Equipos de RRHH y Nómina
    Comparte esta aclaración con los equipos implicados para evitar interpretaciones erróneas y asegurar un tratamiento uniforme.
  5. Consulte con Expertos SAP si lo necesita
    Si el comportamiento del sistema difiere de esta guía, contacte con consultores SAP o soporte técnico.

Nota Final

Esta aclaración por parte de la TGSS elimina ambigüedades y garantiza un tratamiento coherente y conforme a la normativa de las mejoras por nacimiento y cuidado del menor. Revisar su sistema SAP con estas directrices le ayudará a evitar errores y asegurar el cumplimiento legal.

Si tienes dudas o quieres compartir cómo lo estais gestionando en tu organización, te invitamos a participar en los comentarios.

entry.title: Re: converting binary data of word document to PDF in background
entry.content:
Hi Sreenivas,
there is a solution by SAP in the area of document conversion within SAP Document Management.
The Queuing therfore is based on top of sAP workflow. It works smooth and is an elegant solution.
The conversion will be done on dedicated tcp/ip linked workstations by ole-automation. The converison scripts, which will be need, can be written easily. SAP delivers templates for this. We are converting layer based corel draws files through this way. Maybe you can script word with VB basic or
PowerShell. In the area of PDF, we are using the PDF Conversion server from Adobe. It's comparable to Adobe Forms by SAp (the original product is Adobe Output). the Adobe product comes with a huge set of WebServices. There arte also products in the area of CAD on the third-party-market.

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Re: How to Use Measure-Based Dimensions in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm working with SAP Embedded Analytics for Incentive Management. I'm trying to create a dimension based on the unique values of a measure. Example values for the measure are [null, 12, 24, 36] (a.k.a. contract duration). I want to convert these to dimensions [null, "1 Year", "2 Year", "3 Year"].

Best regards, Niels

entry.title: Re: Session 5 Recap & Highlights - Enterprise Architects guide on SAP BW Modernization
entry.content:
@appel_solar_dk As one of the participants on this call, I saw the "BW Modernization" as an essential discussion to give organizations clarity on the path to BDC . We are on BW and in the midst of our move to Datasphere so this was very reassuring to understand that this was addressed .

This is my two cents .

entry.title: Re: The Link Collection for Import Sales Documents
entry.content:
Hi, I have a customer who is requesting the ability to import Inquiries.
Is that possible?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: VIEW Plugin Deployed to CF, but Not Visible in POD Designer
entry.content:
VIEW Plugin Deployed to CF and Registered in Manage Service Registry, but Not Visible in POD Designer

 

commonents.json
-------------------------

{
    "components": [
        {
            "id": "highchartsplugin",
            "type": "VIEW_PLUGIN",
            "allowMultipleInstances": false,
            "name": "vender.custom.plugin.highChartPlugin",
            "propertyEditor": "vender.custom.plugin.highChartPlugin.builder.PropertyEditor",
            "i18n": "vender.custom.plugin.highChartPlugin.i18n.i18n",
            "productionProcessEnabled": true,
           "productionProcessTitle": "highchartsplugin",
            "supportedPodTypes": ["WORK_CENTER","OPERATION","ORDER","OTHER"]
        }  
    ]
}

Please let me know if there are any other areas I should check. I've already followed the tutorials available in the community

entry.title: Re: Invoice Date Control While Creating Customer Invoice
entry.content: Hello Chuma,
